race.description: Renew Your Membership Today Mdn Plate
race.comment: BEES KNEES (6) kept safe in betting on debut and ran accordingly with a respectable third over 1100m at Scone. Will be better for that experience and can get the job done with Dalton's 2kg claim. LONG LIVE (2) has a host of gear changes for this and expected to have strengthened over the break. Primed with the sharp trial win over 800m at Scone. Now in the Jason Deamer yard and can go close here. NOT SO WRONG (3) just over a month between runs when he speared across from the outside gate to grip on and finish a narrow third over 1000m at Tamworth. Can get the job done with the 4kg claimer aboard. HARRY (1) has a stack of gear changes today and will appreciate the extra trip. Found them too sharp over the 800m when fourth over 800m at Narromine. Looking for a firmer surface and sure to be thereabouts.
